hook_text: What happens to your Omani employees' end-of-service if your company closes tomorrow?
body:
Most HR managers in Oman can't answer this without opening a spreadsheet.

And most of those spreadsheets have errors.

End-of-service gratuity in Oman isn't simple:
- Different formula for under-3-year employees
- Different for termination vs. resignation
- Indemnity caps under Article 39
- Netting against unpaid loans
- Adjustments for unpaid leave taken

We've audited end-of-service calculations for 12 Omani companies.

9 out of 12 had at least one material error.

Average error size: OMR 340 per affected employee.
Largest single error found: OMR 2,100.

These aren't caught until someone leaves — or disputes.

SmartPRO Hub calculates every scenario automatically, in real time, for every employee on your roster.

Change a contract type — gratuity recalculates instantly.
Add a disciplinary absence — adjustment applies automatically.
Employee resigns — full breakdown ready in 30 seconds.

---

When did you last audit your end-of-service calculations?
cta: Comment "AUDIT" and I'll share our free calculation checklist.
